/**
 * Continuously run this as a daemon to discover how "disordered" the kafka queue is.
 * This daemon only store a digest so it should not be space-consuming
 */
"Thread %d processed %d messages. Max disorder time is %d , max disorder offset is %d"
"Thread %d finishes after %d messages. Max disorder time is %d , max disorder offset is %d"
